pages.title: Old Textures
pages.text: 3 in total:$(p) Quark Programmer Art$(br) [1.20.1]ProgrammerArtFix-rv2$(br) Programmer Art$(p)$(2)$(l)*/$ When entering the game for the first time, please $(l)check the above resourcepacks are loaded and arranged in the above order/$

$(br)$(li)In order to restore Minecraft 1.12 and make the world more in line with the context, the old resourcepack has been added$(br)$(li)If you can't accept textures such as netherrack, you can turn off these resourcepack on your own
